svg.title: DeathStarBench Social Network Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram of all microservices, their roles, storage backends, and inter-service communication in the DeathStarBench Social Network benchmark.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Nginx do in DeathStarBench social network?')
sendPrompt('What does ComposePostService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does UniqueIdService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does TextService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does UrlShortenService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does UserMentionService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does MediaService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does PostStorageService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does UserService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does UserTimelineService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does HomeTimelineService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does WriteHomeTimelineService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('What does SocialGraphService do in DeathStarBench?')
sendPrompt('Which MongoDB collections exist in the DeathStarBench social network?')
sendPrompt('How is Redis used in DeathStarBench social network?')
sendPrompt('How is Memcached used in DeathStarBench social network?')
sendPrompt('What does Jaeger do in DeathStarBench?')

svg.text: WriteHomeTimeline uses Rabbit MQ for async fan-out from ComposePost
